frase_original: I’ll see you later,” I murmured.“Yeah.” Our foreheads pressed together. Our lips lingered half an inch apart. Thin ropes of dark hair hung over his forehead as sweat glistened across his face in the streetlights. “Love you.”“Love you more,” he murmured.

texto: Hmm, do you mind if I put out your fire then?” I brushed his earlobe with my upper lip.
